title: kubeadm Configuration (v1beta3) — JoinControlPlane
text:
Appears in:
JoinConfiguration
JoinControlPlane contains elements describing an additional control plane instance
to be deployed on the joining node.
Field
Description
localAPIEndpoint
APIEndpoint
localAPIEndpoint
represents the endpoint of the API server instance to be
deployed on this node.
certificateKey
string
certificateKey
is the key that is used for decryption of certificates after
they are downloaded from the secret upon joining a new control plane node.
The corresponding encryption key is in the InitConfiguration.
The certificate key is a hex encoded string that is an AES key of size 32 bytes.
localAPIEndpoint
represents the endpoint of the API server instance to be
deployed on this node.
certificateKey
is the key that is used for decryption of certificates after
they are downloaded from the secret upon joining a new control plane node.
The corresponding encryption key is in the InitConfiguration.
The certificate key is a hex encoded string that is an AES key of size 32 bytes.
